title: Viberzi (eluxadoline) tablets measured dose — heading 3004 Free
source: CROSS NY N302614 (15 Feb 2019) — Viberzi Tablets dosage form → 3004.90.9260, rate of duty Free. Same letter as Eluxadoline bulk at 6%.

value_note.contrast: Bulk eluxadoline on the same letter is 6% MFN — honest same-letter dollar delta if origin does not erase it via preference
